post_text: 🚀 Big shifts in Artificial Intelligence: Google just redesigned the search box for the first time in 25 years — here’s why it matters more than you think.. This changes how we build products. Here is a quick breakdown. What do you think?
hook: The New Era of Artificial Intelligence
alt_text: Text slides describing: Google just redesigned the search box for the first time in 25 years — here’s why it matters more than you think.
first_comment: Link in bio to read the full report!

carousel_slides.body_text: If users get answers directly in the search box, your website clicks will drop. You need to optimize for AI references.
Include clean structured schemas on your landing page so models like Gemini and ChatGPT index your content directly.
Relying on SEO is a dying playbook. Transition to email newsletters and social communities where you own the audience.
Create simple tool hooks that deliver immediate value to users so they don't have to search Google to solve their problems.
Focus on high-quality content, direct distribution, and indexing optimization.

carousel_slides.subtitle: Join our community of builders and founders.

infographic_data.subtitle: How the new search layout shifts organic click-through rates.
infographic_data.takeaway_text: Drop in organic web traffic expected for standard blogs over the next 18 months.

reel_script.visual_scene_1: Founder looking shocked at a Google Search page on monitor.
reel_script.audio_script_1: Google just did the unthinkable. They redesigned their search box after 25 years.
reel_script.visual_scene_2: Transition to graphic showing zero-click searches statistics.
reel_script.audio_script_2: Here's what it means for your business: organic traffic is shifting entirely to AI citations.
